message:
docs(mpsc): add documentation for channel methods and fix test timing

Add rustdoc comments to public methods in the mpsc channel implementation
to clarify their semantics and improve API discoverability.

Documentation additions:
- WeakSender::upgrade: Explain upgrade semantics and None return
- SendPermit::send: Document slot commitment behavior
- SendPermit::abort: Document slot release without sending
- Receiver::recv: Document receive future creation
- Receiver::try_recv: Document non-blocking receive
- Receiver::is_closed: Document sender drop detection
- Receiver::has_messages/len/is_empty/capacity: Document queue inspection

Test improvements:
- channel_conformance.rs: Use async send() instead of reserve+send
- channel_conformance.rs: Await recv() properly for async semantics
- net_unix.rs: Fix race conditions by moving listener creation into
  server thread and using mpsc channel for synchronization instead
  of fixed sleep delays
- Update test fixtures to use recv_timeout for proper error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
